description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages test and deploy, using the elixir:latest image for Elixir jobs and node:latest image for JavaScript jobs, and include a postgres:latest service for the core test job. In the test stage add a core test job that runs cd core, mix local.hex --force, mix local.rebar --force, mix deps.get then mix test, sets POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_HOST, POSTGRES_PASSWORD and POSTGRES_USER variables, and only triggers on changes under core/**/*. Also in the test stage add a web test job that runs cd web-ui, yarn install then yarn test, and only triggers on changes under web-ui/**/*. In the deploy stage add a deploy core job that runs cd core, mix local.hex --force, mix local.rebar --force, mix deps.get then mix compile, deploys to the production environment, and only runs on changes under core/**/* when the ref is master. Finally add a deploy web job that runs cd web-ui, yarn install then yarn build, deploys to the production environment, and only runs on changes under web-ui/**/* when the ref is master.
